evals.prompt: Let's build the world for a new Ironsworn campaign. I'm ready to answer all 11 truths.
evals.expected_output: GM runs through all 11 truth categories in order, presents options for each, receives player choices, locks each truth with a summary sentence, and records all 11 to lore plus creates referenced entities and links them.

assertions.description: summary.json truths_recorded array contains exactly 11 entries
At least 4 non-truth entities created (material, faction, concept, or place)
At least 8 lore links created connecting truths to entities
A complete world summary paragraph appears after all 11 truths
transcript contains upsert_lore blocks (one per truth)

evals.prompt: Set up the Ironlands for a new campaign. I already know: the iron comes from elven ruins (elves track broken vows), and the deepest darkness is something waking in the oldest ruins. Build from there.
evals.expected_output: GM recognises the pre-seeded answers, skips or confirms truths 2 and 11, and critically adapts truth 9 (Firstborn) to reflect that elves are already established — asking about their behaviour rather than whether they exist. All 11 truths recorded.

assertions.description: summary.json truths_recorded array contains exactly 11 entries
summary.json firstborn_adapted is true — GM changed the Firstborn question to reflect established elves
Firstborn section in transcript does NOT ask 'do elder races exist' — it assumes they do and asks about behaviour
assertions.check: transcript does not contain 'do elder races exist' or 'do the Firstborn exist'

assertions.description: GM does not re-present the full Iron options A/B/C after player already stated it
assertions.check: transcript does not re-ask Iron from scratch after player's opening statement

assertions.description: World summary paragraph appears after all 11 truths

evals.prompt: World truths time. I want to give completely custom answers — no preset options. Just ask me about each truth and I'll tell you what I want.
evals.expected_output: GM presents each truth category as an open question rather than a multiple-choice list, receives freeform player answers, integrates them into coherent locked summaries, and records them to lore.

assertions.description: summary.json open_question_format_used is true — GM asked open questions not A/B/C lists
transcript does not show GM presenting A / B / C options after player said they want custom
assertions.check: transcript does not contain forced A/B/C option lists after the player's request

assertions.description: Locked summaries reflect the custom content (fungal iron, exile, etc.) not generic defaults
assertions.check: locked summaries in transcript contain player's custom content, not boilerplate
